title: sida harleyi
intro: Sida harleyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow or hibiscus family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sida harleyi include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
